catalogue.description: Read-only AI gateway diagnostics: provider state, feature flags, task routing, and request/failure counters. Does not own AI provider logic — that lives in core/runtime/ai/.
Cog management, server stats, diagnostics
Bot health, latency, and system diagnostics
Per-guild moderation/cleanup event logging — channel selection, auto-create, and audit (S7)
Unified hub for moderation, channels, roles, cleanup, setup
Read-only browsing of platform settings, bindings, and audit history (S5)
Interface gallery — browse UI patterns, all fake & safe
Progression, roles, and community activities
Live server activity dashboard — leaders, level-ups, game stats
Live member-count channels (total · humans · bots)
Member greetings, farewells, and an optional entry role
Daily coins, work, shop, balance
Item management and crafting
Mining minigame and resource collection

Deterministic Bloons Tower Defense 6 assistant — tower/hero/map lookups, round threat summaries, and CHIMPS-mode guidance. Built on validated fixtures; consumes the AI gateway only when explicitly enabled (Module 5).
Blackjack card game
Collaborative counting game
1v1 duel battles
Fishing minigame — cast a line, build your collection
Competitive games and channel activities
Rock Paper Scissors: quick play, PvP, bot matches, tournaments
Word-chaining game
Channel and category creation, deletion, and restrictions
Time-based and XP-based automatic role assignment
Spam, invite links, excessive caps, and mass-mention filtering
Prohibited words, command deletion, channel hygiene
Scan uploaded images for sexual, violent, harassment, or hate content
Warnings, timeouts, bans, mod logs
Proof submission and exclusive access sessions
Raid detection + account-age screening on member join
Server leaderboards for XP, coins, and games
Experience points, levels, and leaderboards
A leafy little easter-egg panel — wisdom and number trivia
General bot commands and information
Interactive help menu and command discovery
General utility commands

commands.name: access
commands.usage: Open the read-only access-policy explorer.

commands.name: admin
commands.usage: Open the Admin control panel (administrator only).

commands.name: adminmenu
commands.usage: Open the interactive admin control panel.

commands.name: ai
commands.usage: Open the AI Platform panel.

commands.name: aimenu
commands.usage: Open the AI Platform panel (alias for ``!ai``).

commands.name: aimenu
commands.usage: Open the AI Platform panel (administrator only).

commands.name: check_database
commands.usage: Verify that all expected PostgreSQL tables exist.

commands.name: cog
commands.usage: Load, unload, or reload a cog by name (underscores and _cog suffix optional).

commands.usage: Open the interactive cog manager — the panel's 📋 Cog List button.

commands.name: create
commands.usage: Preview + create a new log channel for any registered route.

commands.name: diagnostic_bot_status
commands.usage: Display bot health and performance metrics.

commands.name: diagnostics
commands.usage: Open the interactive diagnostics hub panel.

commands.usage: Search for commands by keyword in their name or description.

commands.usage: Flush the chat-memory cache for THIS channel.

commands.usage: Lifecycle state (phase, pending request, recent events).

commands.name: recent_errors

commands.usage: Open the Forge — build it to unlock higher-tier gear crafting.
